key_concepts: A simple way to reduce dimensions for high-cardinality features.
Replaces the category label with the frequency (or raw count) of its occurrence in the dataset.
If the frequency is correlated with the specific target task, this provides strong signal.
Risk: Two totally different categories sharing the same count will collide and look identical to the model.

definitions.definition: Mengganti nama kelas kategori tekstual dengan nilai persentase proporsi kemunculannya di himpunan rujukan awal.

examples: Replacing city names with the strict number of orders placed in those respective cities.
